title: An Act Regarding Home Heating Fuel Assistance
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, May 22, 2025
last_house_action: 5/14/2025 - The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on HEALTH AND HUMAN SERVICES . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 5/22/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)

actions.description: Committee on HEALTH AND HUMAN SERVICES suggested and ordered printed On motion by Senator NANGLE of Cumberland Tabled until Later in Today's Session, pending REFERENCE Unfinished Business
